title: pelargonium × richianum
intro: Pelargonium × richianum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its fragrant, rose-like flowers and pungent leaves. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
